name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
"𝘿𝙞𝙙 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙛𝙤𝙧𝙜𝙚𝙩 𝙬𝙝𝙤 𝙮𝙤𝙪'𝙧𝙚 𝙙𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜?"     |
where Sukuna is jealous and deranged.


_________


A long time coming bot! Was requested a long time ago but I finally had the stroke of inspiration to write it.

WARNING: he is very toxic in this as expected lol. i dont plan on making him super nice or normal in any of my bots.

also, this is kinda set in modern times though just imagine he isn't in Yuuji's body 😭 i dont really have the brain capacity to try and think of a reason why he isn't lol

anyways, enjoyyy 🫶🏼
